subcodes.first_line: O my God! From Thy servant hath come a letter wherein he hath acknowledged Thy unity and confessed Thy singleness, and sought forgiveness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی قد حضر من عبدک کتاب فیه اقر بوحدانیتک و اعترف بفردانیتک و اراد العفو
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @prayer for teaching
